Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12608 0 0}Hm? Who are you? By the looks of it, we go to the same school...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}Sorry, but I'm busy trying to decide what to eat here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}Should I go with the pork ramen and chase it with rice? Or perhaps a large Hagakure Bowl?[n]{f 1 1}
